# Data Source: auth0_user_connected_accounts

Data source to retrieve all connected accounts for a specific Auth0 user.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (String) The ID of the user.

### Read-Only

- `connected_accounts` (List of Object) List of connected accounts for the user. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--connected_accounts))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--connected_accounts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `connected_accounts`

Read-Only:

- `access_type` (String)
- `connection` (String)
- `connection_id` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `expires_at` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `organization_id` (String)
- `scopes` (List of String)
- `strategy` (String)
